title: Joe Carlsmith
description: Joe is a senior advisor at [Open Philanthropy](https://openphilanthropy.org/), and [writes independently](https://joecarlsmith.com/) about various topics in philosophy and futurism. He has a doctorate in philosophy from the University of Ox
body:
# Joe Carlsmith

Joe is a senior advisor at [Open Philanthropy](https://openphilanthropy.org/), and [writes independently](https://joecarlsmith.com/) about various topics in philosophy and futurism. He has a doctorate in philosophy from the University of Oxford.
text: Joe Carlsmith Joe is a senior advisor at Open Philanthropy, and writes independently about various topics in philosophy and futurism. He has a doctorate in philosophy from the University of Oxford.
